channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Photos Show Earthquake Damage in Venezuela
item.description: The earthquakes were the strongest to hit Venezuela in more than a century.

item.title: Supreme Court Allows U.S. to Turn Away Asylum Seekers at Border
item.description: In a 6-3 decision, the court ruled that federal law permits blocking asylum seekers from entering the country.

item.title: The Viking chant that became Norway's World Cup rallying cry
item.description: Norway's long-awaited World Cup return is being powered by a viral Viking "rowing" chant that's sweeping the world, from Boston train stations to Time...

item.title: Trump can begin deportations of Syrian, Haitian TPS holders, Supreme Court says
item.description: Writing for the court majority, Justice Samuel Alito that under the TPS law, the president has unreviewable authority to end the program, without inte...
